docs.text: Data Scientist Hub ¶ Data Scientist Hub (DSH) is my personal knowledge center. DSH contents is organized with the following structure. current website progress 60% 🔰 Home ¶ Sitemap and main table of contents. 👨‍💻 Projects ¶ Personal projects and progress tracker. ⛵ Captain's Log ¶ Logbook with notes on DSH development and misc stuff. 🗃️ Resources ¶ Collection of links to useful resources.

Latest release changelog: implement blog feature thanks to mkdocs-blog-plugin add contents to Repositories add Mastermind app as first deliverable in Products implement minor improvements to Resources including Career Development section

docs.text: Streamlit Mastermind ¶ Mastermind is a code-breaking game for two players, here implemented via Python with a Streamlit interface. Live version of the app can be found hosted on Streamlit Sharing ( you can click on the Streamlit badge on the top of this page ) or Heroku ( thanks to S Ahmad and hannahyan for the wonderful deployment tutorials! ).
docs.title: Mastermind

docs.text: Mastermind is a code-breaking game for two players, here implemented via Python with a Streamlit interface. Live version of the app can be found hosted on Streamlit Sharing ( you can click on the Streamlit badge on the top of this page ) or Heroku ( thanks to S Ahmad and hannahyan for the wonderful deployment tutorials! ).
docs.title: Streamlit Mastermind
